LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAR-28-2023 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DENISE WEAR'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. ONLY DEPARTMENT 206 HAS JURISDICTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATES. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. Stanley Shen, Esq. of Shen Law Firm, 415.661.6700, appearing in person for Plaintiff Denise Wear;

Mr. Shen informs the Court that a settlement has been reached. Mr. Frank states that a motion to continue the trial date is on calendar for February 14, 2024.

Following counsels' updates, the Court orders the matter off calendar and confirms the trial date.

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-28-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DENISE WEAR's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for leave to file first amended complaint is granted. Only Department 206 has jurisdiction to continue trial dates.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
